name: vasa_ddx4
description: Zebrafish germline factor: vasa (ddx4) — DEAD-box RNA helicase, germ plasm marker; single copy in zebrafish (one ohnolog lost post-TGD). Most vertebrate germline RNA-binding genes (vasa/ddx4, nanos, piwi family) lost one of their two TGD-ohnologs in teleosts under tight dosage selection — useful negative controls when scanning for retained-ohnolog patterns post-WGD.
